channel.title: Pigsty – Category: TYPE
channel.description: Recent content in Category: TYPE on Pigsty

item.title: Docs: prefix
item.description:
Overview

PGDG 1st Party Extension: prefix : Prefix Range module for PostgreSQL

Information

  • ID: 2500
  • Name: prefix
  • Alias: prefix
  • Category: TYPE
  • Website: https://github.com/dimitri/prefix
  • License: PostgreSQL License
  • Language: Unknown
  • Tags: N/A
  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • Version: 1.2.0
  • PG Vers: 17,16,15,14,13,12
  • Need Load: Lib Loading NOT Required
  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Not Relocatable
  • Trusted: Untrusted, Require Superuser to Create
  • Schemas: N/A
  • Requires: N/A

Packages

  • RPM Repo: PGDG
  • RPM Name: prefix_$v*
  • RPM Ver : 1.2.0
  • RPM Deps: Nil
  • DEB Repo: PGDG
  • DEB Name: postgresql-$v-prefix
  • DEB Ver : 1.2.0
  • DEB Deps: Nil

Details

item.title: Docs: pgfaceting
item.description:
Overview

PIGSTY 3rd Party Extension: pgfaceting : fast faceting queries using an inverted index

Information

  • ID: 2560
  • Name: pgfaceting
  • Alias: pgfaceting
  • Category: TYPE
  • Website: https://github.com/cybertec-postgresql/pgfaceting
  • License: BSD 3 License
  • Language: Pure SQL
  • Tags: N/A
  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • Version: 0.2.0
  • PG Vers: 17,16,15,14,13,12
  • Need Load: Lib Loading NOT Required
  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Relocatable
  • Trusted: Trusted, Can be created by user with CREATE Privilege
  • Schemas: faceting
  • Requires: roaringbitmap

Packages

  • RPM Repo: PIGSTY
  • RPM Name: pgfaceting_$v
  • RPM Ver : 0.2.0
  • RPM Deps: Nil
  • DEB Repo: PGDG
  • DEB Name: postgresql-$v-pgfaceting
  • DEB Ver : 0.2.0
  • DEB Deps: Nil

item.title: Docs: seg
item.description:
Overview

  • Tags: N/A
  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • Version: 1.4
  • PG Vers: 17,16,15,14,13,12
  • Need Load: Lib Loading NOT Required
  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Unknown
  • Trusted: Trusted, Can be created by user with CREATE Privilege
  • Schemas: N/A
  • Requires: N/A
